name: Fifth Edition

draft.notes: Basic lands do NOT appear in booster packs. Commons split into three runs (A/B/C, US) or two sheets (Belgian).

sourceNotes: English printings from both USA and Belgium; both are 11C+3U+1R 15-card packs (36/box). US uses sequential collation, Belgian uses striped. No basic lands in boosters. No foils (pre-1999). Four basic-land art variations.
